timer_toggle_auto_start_work_desc: Automatically begin the next work session after a break ends.
timer_toggle_auto_start_break_desc: Automatically begin a break when a work session ends.
timer_toggle_short_breaks_desc: Skip the short break between work rounds.
timer_toggle_long_breaks_desc: Skip the long break at the end of each cycle.
timer_toggle_countdown_desc: Arc starts full and subtracts as time passes.
notif_toggle_desktop_desc: Show a system notification when each round ends.
notif_toggle_tick_work_desc: Play a ticking sound during work sessions.
notif_toggle_tick_break_desc: Play a ticking sound during break sessions.
system_toggle_aot_desc: Keep the timer window above all other windows.
system_toggle_break_aot_desc: Disable always-on-top while a break is running.
system_toggle_show_tray_desc: Display a persistent icon in the system tray.
system_toggle_min_tray_desc: Hide the window to the tray when minimized.
system_toggle_close_tray_desc: Hide to the tray instead of quitting when the window is closed.
system_toggle_websocket_desc: Expose a local WebSocket endpoint for external integrations (port {port}).
system_toggle_check_updates_desc: Automatically check for new versions when Settings is opened.
shortcuts_accessibility_notice: Global shortcuts require Accessibility access on macOS. Enable Pomotroid in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.
shortcuts_note: Global shortcuts work even when the window is not focused. Click a field and press your desired key combination to record it.
shortcuts_toggle_enabled_desc: Register system-wide keyboard shortcuts for controlling the timer.
advanced_toggle_verbose_logging_desc: Enable detailed debug logging to help diagnose issues.
about_reset_confirm: This will reset all settings to defaults.
stats_empty_history: Complete your first session to see your history
notification_work_body: Time to get back to work. You've got this!
notification_work_start_body: Time to focus. You've got this!
notification_short_break_body: Take a short break. Stretch, breathe, relax.
notification_long_break_body: You've earned a long break. Step away and recharge.
